# problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel { #skrom.problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel }

`problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel`

Parallel implementation of master_class using multithreading for snapshot generation and ROM evaluation.

## Notes {.doc-section .doc-section-notes}

Authors: Suparno Bhattacharyya

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [ensure_problem_registered](#skrom.problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel.ensure_problem_registered) | Import the module that defines the problem (so @register_problem runs). |

### ensure_problem_registered { #skrom.problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel.ensure_problem_registered }

```python
problem_classes.static.master_class_parallel.ensure_problem_registered(
    problem_name,
)
```

Import the module that defines the problem (so @register_problem runs).

Supports:
  - local file: ./problem_name.py  (when cwd is repo root OR problem folder)
  - local package: ./problem_name/__init__.py
  - package module: skrom.problem_classes.static.problem_name
